questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Proteins are the main structural components of biomolecules.
questions.reason: Reason (R): They provide shape and function to the cells and tissues in living organisms.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Carbohydrates are the main energy source of biomolecules.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
